issues.message: array.find() in a loop is O(n*m) - build a Map for O(1) lookups

issues.title: react-doctor(async-await-in-loop)
issues.message: await inside a for-loop runs the calls sequentially - for independent operations, collect them and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run them concurrently

issues.title: react-doctor(server-sequential-independent-await)
issues.message: Sequential `await` without a data dependency on the previous result - wrap the independent calls in `Promise.all([...])` so they race instead of waterfalling

issues.title: jsx-a11y(no-autofocus)
issues.message: The `autoFocus` attribute is found here, which can cause usability issues for sighted and non-sighted users.
issues.recommendation: Remove the `autoFocus` attribute.

issues.title: react-doctor(no-button-navigation)
issues.message: button onClick performs navigation - use a real link or framework Link so browser navigation affordances keep working

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-state-only-in-handlers)
issues.message: useState "expanded" is updated but never read in the component's return - use useRef so updates don't trigger re-renders

issues.title: react-doctor(no-derived-useState)
issues.message: useState initialized from prop "isPrimary" - if this value should stay in sync with the prop, derive it during render instead

issues.title: react-doctor(no-secrets-in-client-code)

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-content-visibility)
issues.message: large mapped list item lacks content-visibility hints - add contentVisibility: 'auto' / containIntrinsicSize or virtualize the list to defer off-screen work

issues.title: react-doctor(no-effect-event-handler)
issues.message: useEffect simulating an event handler - move logic to an actual event handler instead

issues.title: react-doctor(effect-no-event-handler)
issues.message: useEffect simulating an event handler - move logic to an actual event handler instead

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-content-visibility)
issues.message: large mapped list item lacks content-visibility hints - add contentVisibility: 'auto' / containIntrinsicSize or virtualize the list to defer off-screen work

issues.title: react-doctor(no-array-index-as-key)
issues.message: Array index "i" used as key - causes bugs when list is reordered or filtered

issues.title: react-doctor(no-icon-only-button-without-label)
issues.message: icon-only button has no accessible name - add aria-label or aria-labelledby and hide decorative icons with aria-hidden

issues.title: react-doctor(design-no-redundant-padding-axes)
issues.message: px-1 py-1 → use the shorthand p-1

issues.title: react-doctor(no-icon-only-button-without-label)
issues.message: icon-only button has no accessible name - add aria-label or aria-labelledby and hide decorative icons with aria-hidden

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-hydration-mismatch-time)
issues.message: new Date() reachable from JSX renders differently on server vs client - move it to client-only state or render a stable server placeholder instead of silencing the mismatch

issues.title: react-hooks(rules-of-hooks)
issues.message: React Hook "use" is called in function "Anonymous" that is neither a React function component nor a custom React Hook function. React component names must start with an uppercase letter. React Hook names must start with the word "use".

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .map().filter() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(server-sequential-independent-await)
issues.message: Sequential `await` without a data dependency on the previous result - wrap the independent calls in `Promise.all([...])` so they race instead of waterfalling

issues.title: react-doctor(server-sequential-independent-await)
issues.message: Sequential `await` without a data dependency on the previous result - wrap the independent calls in `Promise.all([...])` so they race instead of waterfalling

issues.title: react-doctor(no-react19-deprecated-apis)
issues.message: useContext is superseded by `use()` on React 19+ - `use()` reads context conditionally inside hooks, branches, and loops; switch to `import { use } from 'react'`

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: react-doctor(js-request-idle-callback)
issues.message: non-critical analytics/logging runs immediately - schedule it with requestIdleCallback (with a timeout if required) so input and animation work stay responsive

issues.title: react-doctor(no-swallowed-error)

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .filter().filter() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(async-await-in-loop)
issues.message: await inside a for…of loop runs the calls sequentially - for independent operations, collect them and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run them concurrently

issues.title: react-doctor(async-await-in-loop)

issues.title: react-doctor(js-tosorted-immutable)
issues.message: [...array].sort() - use array.toSorted() for immutable sorting (ES2023)

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .map().filter() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(no-fetch-in-effect)
issues.message: fetch() inside useEffect - use a data fetching library (react-query, SWR) or server component

issues.title: react-doctor(client-swr-dedup)
issues.message: fetch inside useEffect creates per-instance requests - use SWR/useSWRMutation or a shared client data layer for deduplication and caching

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .filter().map() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-content-visibility)
issues.message: large mapped list item lacks content-visibility hints - add contentVisibility: 'auto' / containIntrinsicSize or virtualize the list to defer off-screen work

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: react-doctor(async-await-in-loop)
issues.message: await inside a while-loop runs the calls sequentially - for independent operations, collect them and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run them concurrently

issues.title: react-doctor(js-set-map-lookups)
issues.message: array.indexOf() in a loop is O(n) per call - convert to a Set for O(1) lookups

issues.title: react-doctor(async-suspense-boundaries)
issues.message: async component renders without a Suspense boundary - wrap slower child regions in <Suspense> so React can stream available content

issues.title: react-doctor(no-react19-deprecated-apis)
issues.message: forwardRef is no longer needed on React 19+ - refs are regular props on function components; remove forwardRef and pass ref directly

issues.title: react-doctor(js-cache-function-results)
issues.message: useRef(null) is computed repeatedly in the same block - cache the result in one variable or a module-level Map if it is reused across calls

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-svg-precision)
issues.message: SVG d attribute uses 4+ decimal precision - truncate to 1-2 decimals to shrink markup with no visible difference

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-svg-precision)
issues.message: SVG d attribute uses 4+ decimal precision - truncate to 1-2 decimals to shrink markup with no visible difference

issues.title: react-doctor(use-lazy-motion)
issues.message: Import "m" with LazyMotion instead of "motion" - saves ~30kb in bundle size

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: react-doctor(no-icon-only-button-without-label)
issues.message: icon-only button has no accessible name - add aria-label or aria-labelledby and hide decorative icons with aria-hidden

issues.title: react-doctor(async-await-in-loop)
issues.message: await inside a for-loop runs the calls sequentially - for independent operations, collect them and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run them concurrently

issues.title: react-doctor(server-sequential-independent-await)

issues.title: jsx-a11y(no-autofocus)

issues.title: react-doctor(no-button-navigation)
issues.message: button onClick performs navigation - use a real link or framework Link so browser navigation affordances keep working

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-state-only-in-handlers)

issues.title: react-doctor(no-derived-useState)

issues.message: await inside a while-loop runs the calls sequentially - for independent operations, collect them and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run them concurrently

issues.title: react-doctor(js-set-map-lookups)
issues.message: array.indexOf() in a loop is O(n) per call - convert to a Set for O(1) lookups

issues.message: openDatabase(dbPath) is computed repeatedly in the same block - cache the result in one variable or a module-level Map if it is reused across calls

issues.title: react-doctor(no-react19-deprecated-apis)
issues.message: useContext is superseded by `use()` on React 19+ - `use()` reads context conditionally inside hooks, branches, and loops; switch to `import { use } from 'react'`

issues.title: react-doctor(js-min-max-loop)
issues.message: array.sort()[0] for min/max - use Math.min(...array) instead (O(n) vs O(n log n))

issues.title: react-doctor(js-tosorted-immutable)
issues.message: [...array].sort() - use array.toSorted() for immutable sorting (ES2023)

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-content-visibility)
issues.message: large mapped list item lacks content-visibility hints - add contentVisibility: 'auto' / containIntrinsicSize or virtualize the list to defer off-screen work

issues.title: react-doctor(async-await-in-loop)
issues.message: await inside a for-loop runs the calls sequentially - for independent operations, collect them and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run them concurrently

issues.title: react-doctor(server-sequential-independent-await)

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-state-only-in-handlers)

issues.title: react-doctor(no-derived-useState)

issues.title: react-doctor(async-suspense-boundaries)
issues.message: async component renders without a Suspense boundary - wrap slower child regions in <Suspense> so React can stream available content

issues.title: react-doctor(no-react19-deprecated-apis)
issues.message: forwardRef is no longer needed on React 19+ - refs are regular props on function components; remove forwardRef and pass ref directly

issues.title: react-doctor(js-cache-function-results)
issues.message: useRef(null) is computed repeatedly in the same block - cache the result in one variable or a module-level Map if it is reused across calls

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-svg-precision)
issues.message: SVG d attribute uses 4+ decimal precision - truncate to 1-2 decimals to shrink markup with no visible difference

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-svg-precision)
issues.message: SVG d attribute uses 4+ decimal precision - truncate to 1-2 decimals to shrink markup with no visible difference

issues.title: react-doctor(use-lazy-motion)
issues.message: Import "m" with LazyMotion instead of "motion" - saves ~30kb in bundle size

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: react-doctor(no-icon-only-button-without-label)
issues.message: icon-only button has no accessible name - add aria-label or aria-labelledby and hide decorative icons with aria-hidden

issues.title: react-doctor(client-event-listeners)

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-memo-before-early-return)
issues.message: useMemo returning JSX runs before an early return - extract the JSX into a memoized child component so the parent bails out before the subtree renders
